mnemonics: READ CSV files using read.csv() for Comma Separated Values
keyPoints: Use the read.csv() function to import comma-separated value files into a data frame
The readxl package is essential for importing Excel (.xlsx) files into R
Use write.csv() to export a data frame to a CSV file, being mindful of the row.names argument
commonMistakes: Forgetting to install and load necessary packages like readxl before trying to import Excel files
Not setting stringsAsFactors = FALSE in read.csv(), leading to unintended factor variable conversion
Using absolute file paths instead of relative paths, making the code non-portable across different machines
